title: Slash Quit
description: This is a simple mod for the Fabric Loader that adds a command, that when run, closes the game.
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
<hr>

**Mod Description**

Ever just wanted to close Minecraft without pressing the "Disconnect", or "Save and Quit to Title" buttons? Then this mod is for you! This mod just adds the _/quit_ command. What it does, is (obviously) close the game, as if you pressed the _Quit Game_ button (worlds will be saved).  
Before the game closes, a sound will play, and a toast notification will appear, letting you know that the game will close in **2.5**s.
<hr>

**Mod Demonstration Video**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/oe_i-f77DMY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
